cards.back: A measure of the linear relationship between two continuous variables, ranging from -1 (perfect negative correlation) to 1 (perfect positive correlation)
A table used to summarize and analyze data by creating a cross-tabulation of two or more variables
A square matrix that summarizes the covariance between each pair of variables in a multivariate dataset
A graphical representation of the relationship between two continuous variables, showing the distribution and patterns of the data
A statistical method that models the relationship between multiple independent variables and a single dependent variable, using a linear equation
